title: Mobile Developer
description: DigitalOcean is hiring a Mobile Developer to build iOS and Android applications that help developers manage their cloud infrastructure. You'll contribute to an open-source culture, work with a distributed team, and have direct impact on millions of users. We value developers who take ownership and ship features with quality and care.
responsibilities: Develop features for DigitalOcean's iOS and Android mobile applications
Write clean, testable code and participate in code reviews with teammates
Debug performance issues and optimize app responsiveness and battery usage
Collaborate with backend engineers to integrate APIs and cloud services
Contribute to open-source mobile libraries and share knowledge with the community
Participate in sprint planning and design reviews to influence product direction

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
skills: Mobile app architecture and design patterns
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, or similar)

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Unlimited PTO and flexible work hours
Professional development budget and conference attendance
